triggers.name: Air

data.tooltip: Whether the entity needs to be gaining or losing air to trigger

triggers.name: Attribute Change
triggers.description: Applies skill effects when a player's attribute changes. api-attribute is the attribute name, api-change is the change, and api-value is the new value

triggers.description: Applies skill effects when a player breaks a block matching the given details

triggers.name: Block Place
triggers.description: Applies skill effects when a player places a block matching the given details

triggers.name: Cast
triggers.description: Applies skill effects when a player casts the skill using either the cast command, the skill bar, or click combos

triggers.description: Applies skill effects when the player disconnects or unlearns the skill. This is always applied with a skill level of 1 just for the sake of math

triggers.name: Crouch
triggers.description: Applies skill effects when a player starts or stops crouching using the shift key

triggers.name: Death
triggers.description: Applies skill effects when a player dies

triggers.description: Applies skill effects when a player harvests a block matching the given details. Typically crops such as Glow Berries.
